title: Improved Solar Still For Fresh Water
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
Bear in mind this is all rough and ready - if you are interested in this topic there are some excellent research papers out there - try this one for starters
Extremely Cost-Effective and Efficient Solar Vapor Generation Under Nonconcentrated Illumination Using thermally Isolated Black Paper 

DOI 10.1002/gch2.201600003
as this video is more or less based on that
